```erlang
-module(solution).
-export([solve/2]).

solve(Nums, Queries) ->
    lists:map(fun(Q) -> process_query(Nums, Q) end, Queries).

process_query(Nums, [Li, Ri, Threshold]) ->
    Subarray = lists:sublist(Nums, Li+1, Ri - Li + 1),
    FreqMap = count_freq(Subarray),
    Candidates = get_candidates(FreqMap, Threshold),
    case Candidates of
        [] -> -1;
        _ -> find_best(Candidates, FreqMap)
    end.

count_freq(Subarray) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(E, Acc) ->
            case maps:is_key(E, Acc) of
                true ->
                    maps:put(E, maps:get(E, Acc) + 1, Acc);
                false ->
                    maps:put(E, 1, Acc)
            end
        end,
        #{},
        Subarray
    ).

get_candidates(FreqMap, Threshold) ->
    lists:filter(
        fun(E) ->
            Count = maps:get(E, FreqMap, 0),
            Count >= Threshold
        end,
        maps:keys(FreqMap)
    ).

find_best(Candidates, FreqMap) ->
    lists:sort(
        fun(A, B) ->
            CountA = maps:get(A, FreqMap),
            CountB = maps:get(B, FreqMap),
            if
                CountA > CountB -> true;
                CountA == CountB -> A < B;
                true -> false
            end
        end,
        Candidates
    ).

                    maxFreq = count;

                    bestNum = num;

                }

            }

        }

        ans.push(bestNum);

    }

    return ans;

}
